title: Define module structure and project scaffolding
description: Architecture is decided (see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md). Next step is to scaffold the FastAPI modular monolith with the bounded context packages, set up SQLModel per BC, configure the base hexagonal adapter conventions, and wire up Firebase Auth middleware. This issue covers the project skeleton before any feature work begins.

value: Backend stack: FastAPI (Python) + SQLModel as ORM. Not NestJS/TypeScript. One Cloud SQL database per bounded context — each BC owns its own database with multiple schemas and tables as needed.
